criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of AI-powered functionalities offered by the app, such as automatic enhancements, style transfers, or object recognition.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, intuitiveness, and user satisfaction with the app's interface and performance.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and engagement levels, indicating its acceptance and trust within the community.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, active user counts, social media mentions.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The range of platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows) on which the app is available, affecting its accessibility to users.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The pricing model of the app, including free, freemium, or paid options, and the value it offers relative to its price.
criteria.sources: App store listings, developer websites, user reviews.
